d: Gerda uses a wooden ladle to splash spring water within a 2-tile radius, healing affected allies for [[120%]]<ATK> HP and dealing [[140%]]<ATK> damage to affected enemies. Enemies affected are also put to sleep for [[1]]s and cannot move or act. Each time a target receives healing equal to [[10%]] of their max HP or is healed [[3]] times by Gerda's hot spring, the sleep extends by [[0.5]]s, up to [[3]]s.
Increases damage dealt to [[150%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage dealt to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage dealt to [[170%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage dealt to [[180%]]<ATK>.

When a battle starts, Gerda leaps forward up to 3 tiles and stomps the ground to unleash a spring, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> damage with an interruption effect to enemies within 1 tile. Then she creates a hot spring within a 2-tile radius. Allies within this area recover [[25%]]<ATK> HP per second, while enemies recover [[4%]]<ATK> HP per second (capped at [[0.5%]] of their max HP). Gerda is [[unaffected|uncontrol]] when casting this skill.
Increases damage to [[220%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[240%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[260%]]<ATK>.
Gerda smashes an enemy with a wooden ladle, dealing [[150%]]<ATK> damage and stunning them for [[1.5]]s. At the same time, Gerda gains a [[340%]]<ATK> shield for [[8]]s.
Increases the shield value to [[360%]]<ATK>.
Increases the shield value to [[380%]]<ATK>.
Increases the shield value to [[400%]]<ATK>.
Reduces damage taken by [[12%]] during battle.
Reduces damage taken by [[16%]] during battle.
Reduces damage taken by [[20%]] during battle.
Gerda increases healing received from the allied hot spring by [[120%]]. Each time an ally is healed by it, the cooldown of Mighty Smash is reduced by [[0.2]]s.
Increases the healing received from the allied hot spring by [[150%]].
When an ally enters an allied hot spring for the first time, they become [[unaffected|uncontrol]] for [[5]]s.
Increases the healing received from the allied hot spring by [[180%]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, when HP drops below [[60%]], reduces damage taken by [[15%]] and recovers [[3%]] of lost HP per second for [[8]]s. Triggers up to once every [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Healing, 12 Ranged DEF.

d: When Gerda stomps the ground during Spring Therapy, she stuns enemies for [[2]]s instead of interrupting them.

When an ally enters Gerda's hot spring area for the first time, they gain a shield that can absorb [[300%]]<ATK> damage. For every [[3]] instances of healing the ally receives from the hot spring, they gain an extra shield that absorbs [[150%]]<ATK> damage. The total shield value from this skill cannot exceed [[450%]]<ATK> per ally at once.
